description: Page schema management for the Page Designer
semantic_description: Page schema management for the Page Designer: stores DSL configuration (kind, blocks, layout, profile) per page key per tenant. Drives runtime rendering at /p/{pageKey}. Answers: what pages exist in this tenant, what is their DSL definition, and which version is active?
lifecycle_description: DRAFT → PUBLISHED → ARCHIVED (page versioning; only PUBLISHED schemas serve runtime requests)
